benefits.description: After adding small dose of tirzepatide to retatrutide, scale moved 2 lbs after 6+ week stall

side_effects.description: Risk of hypoglycemia when stacking multiple GLP-1 RAs; user is monitoring carefully

protocol_notes: Stacking Retatrutide (8 mg) with Tirzepatide. Experienced 6+ week plateau on Reta alone. Added small dose of Tirzepatide with caution due to hypoglycemia risk from combining multiple GLP-1 RAs. User is uncertain about continuing the combination and monitoring closely.
